site_title: Nexo — my little corner of the internet
site_description: A small collection of self-hosted apps, built for me.
hero_tagline: Apps I built for myself. Nothing fancy, nothing tracked. Always one tap away from your home screen.
apps_sub: Tap to open, or wait for the rest to land.
app_finance_desc: Track accounts, categorize spend, and see where the month went. No banks involved.
app_gym_desc: Log lifts, supersets, and PRs. Plate math without doing plate math.
app_time_desc: What did the week actually go to? Per-project timers with a weekly receipt.
app_pomodoro_desc: 25 on, 5 off. Opinionated, doesn't argue with you.
install_sub: It installs like a real app — standalone window, home screen icon, no browser chrome.
install_step1_body: Go to krieger2501.de on your iPhone. Has to be Safari — Chrome can't install PWAs.
install_step2_body: The little square with the arrow at the bottom. You know the one.
install_step3_body: Scroll down in the sheet, tap it, then tap Add.
install_step4_body: It opens standalone, no browser chrome. Looks and feels like a real app.
about_heading: A weekend that got out of hand
about_sub: I wanted a finance app that didn't sell my data. So I made one. Then I wanted a gym tracker. You see where this is going.
about_built_desc: One repo, one set of design tokens. Each app is its own route with its own home screen icon.
about_rules_title: No accounts, no ads, no rush
about_rules_desc: Ships when it's ready. Gets edited when something bugs me. Stays small on purpose.
